title: Relationship
description: A typed, directed (optionally qualified) edge between two Things. The Relationship primitive turns the catalog of things into a knowledge graph: ownership, membership, dependency, derivation, delegation, and more.

predicate.description: The relationship type, e.g. owns, partOf, dependsOn, derivedFrom.

directed.description: Whether the edge is directional (default true).

validDuring.description: Time primitive bounding when the relationship holds.
